name: CircleCI — PostgreSQL field type change broke job distribution
problem_title: Jobs stuck in not-running state — job distributor stopped scanning

expected.notes: Rollback was complex in reality (caused unreadable rows), but initial recommendation should be rollback

mock_problem.title: Jobs stuck in not-running state — job distributor stopped scanning

evidence.details: Job distribution rate dropped from 520/min to 0
Build queue depth growing: 1,400 jobs stuck
PostgreSQL strict schema validation failed on row scan

entries.message: schema validation failed: field 'job_type' expected integer got text on row scan
PostgreSQL type mismatch: column job_type is type integer but expression is type text
distributor scan loop stopped: unrecoverable schema error — no jobs will be distributed
build queue depth: 320 jobs pending, 0 being distributed
build queue depth: 1,020 jobs pending — SLA breach imminent
customer escalations: builds not starting across all orgs
build queue depth: 1,400 jobs — all job classes affected

deployments.commit_message: feat: migrate job_type column from text to integer for perf improvement
fix: retry logic for flaky workers
